## What
Replace `backendDispatch` (1 call) and `dispatchCommand` (3 calls) with `useDispatchCommand` in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/command-palette.tsx`.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No imports of `backendDispatch` or `dispatchCommand`
- [ ] Scope chain automatic from context

## Tests
- [ ] `cd kanban-app/ui && pnpm test` — all unit tests pass
